items.name: Ahmad Razif bin Ismail
items.title: Fleet Manager, Razif Transport Sdn. Bhd.
items.body: ACL Agency has been managing our fleet of 40 lorries for the past 5 years. Road tax renewals, insurance, JPJ permits — everything is handled on time, every time. Truly a reliable partner.

items.name: Lee Chong Weng
items.title: Operations Director, Weng Tat Logistics
items.body: Switching to ACL was the best decision we made for our operations. They took over all our vehicle compliance work and we haven't missed a single renewal since. Their team is professional and responsive.

items.name: Siti Nurhaliza binti Daud
items.title: Owner, Daud Brothers Transport
items.body: As a small transporter with 12 trucks, we couldn't afford a full-time admin. ACL gave us enterprise-level fleet management at a very reasonable cost. Highly recommended for all transporters.
